data.title: Police Can Search Cars For Raw Cannabis Smell, Illinois Supreme Court Says
data.description: Illinois Supreme Court rules police can search vehicles based on the smell of raw cannabis, raising privacy concerns and calls for legal clarity.

data.title: NFL Games Set Thanksgiving Day Records: Why This Is Good And Bad News For Streaming Giant Netflix
data.description: Netflix will stream two NFL games on Christmas. Based on viewership records set by the league on Thanksgiving and Black Friday, Netflix is likely to see strong interest.

data.title: Asana Shares Rally After Strong Q3 Results, Upbeat Guidance: Details
data.description: "The launch of AI Studio is the birth of a new category, unlocking a massive Total Addressable Market (TAM) and growth opportunity for the company," says Dustin Moskovitz, CEO of Asana.
